payload.label: cabinet
payload.long_description: Close-up of a white-painted wooden cabinet trim with decorative molding and a recessed beveled panel; the vertical left edge is cut off by the crop (partial/edge-cropped), showing a smooth painted finish with minor scuffing and a dark interior/recess visible to the right; approximate distance from camera ~0.8 m.
